name: Urolithin A older-adult glucose metabolism registry
summary: Recruiting randomized quadruple-masked trial testing urolithin A versus placebo in adults aged 55 to 100 years, with insulin secretion as the primary endpoint and mitochondrial respiration, brain oxidative metabolism, and gut microbiome secondary endpoints.

trial_details.expected_results_window: The registry estimated study completion on March 31, 2027 and had no posted results in the June 10, 2026 API view.
trial_details.horizon_note: Recruiting trial-watch context, not evidence of benefit.
trial_details.why_it_matters: The study could clarify whether urolithin A changes metabolic and mitochondrial measures in older adults, but current registry status only affects watchlist and coverage completeness.
